title: dicksonia cicutaria var. tenera
intro: Dicksonia cicutaria var. tenera, also known as the Tenera fern, is a variety of the Dicksonia cicutaria plant, a type of tree fern native to New Zealand. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of the Tenera fern include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for skin conditions and injuries. The herbal preparations of the Tenera fern typically involve drying and processing the fronds, which can be made into teas, tinctures, or topical creams for medicinal use.
